Why This Matters

Keeping the daily update posted on the website reinforces transparency and provides a stable, reviewable record of repo activity — even on quiet days. Content PRs like this exercise the website CI and review loop, helping catch formatting or deployment issues early without touching engine runtime code. For contributors and users, a consistent daily log improves onboarding and visibility into project cadence.
